\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"discovery-keepalive-time\\\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.KeepAliveTime.String()),\\n373: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"discovery-keepalive-timeout\\\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.KeepAliveTimeout.String()),\\n374: \\t\\tzap.Bool(\\\"discovery-insecure-transport\\\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.InsecureTransport),\\n375: \\t\\tzap.Bool(\\\"discovery-insecure-skip-tls-verify\\\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.InsecureSkipVerify),\\n376: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"discovery-cert\\\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.Cert),\\n377: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"discovery-key\\\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.Key),\\n378: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"discovery-cacert\\\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.Cacert),\\n379: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"discovery-user\\\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Auth.Username),\\n380: \\n381: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"downgrade-check-interval\\\", sc.DowngradeCheckTime.String()),\\n382: \\t\\tzap.Int(\\\"max-learners\\\", sc.MaxLearners),\\n383: \\n384: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"v2-deprecation\\\", string(ec.V2Deprecation)),\\n385: \\t)\\n386: }\\n387: \\n388: // Config returns the current configuration.\\n389: func (e *Etcd) Config() Config {\\n390: \\treturn e.cfg\\n391: }\\n392: \\n393: // Close gracefully shuts down all servers/listeners.\\n394: // Client requests will be terminated with request timeout.\\n395: // After timeout, enforce remaning requests be closed immediately.\\n396: //\\n397: // The rough workflow to shut down etcd:\\n398: //  1. close the `stopc` channel, so that all error handlers (child\\n399: //     goroutines) won't send back any errors anymore;\\n400: //  2. stop the http and grpc servers gracefully, within request timeout;\\n401: //  3. close all client and metrics listeners, so that etcd server\\n402: //     stops receiving any new connection;\\n403: //  4. call the cancel function to close the gateway context, so that\\n404: //     all gateway connections are closed.\\n405: //  5. stop etcd server gracefully, and ensure the main raft loop\\n406: //     goroutine is stopped;\\n407: //  6. stop all peer listeners, so that it stops receiving peer connections\\n408: //     and messages (wait up to 1-second);\\n409: //  7. wait for all child goroutines (i.e. client handlers, peer handlers\\n410: //     and metrics handlers) to exit;\\n411: //  8. close the `errc` channel to release the resource. Note that it's only\\n412: //     safe to close the `errc` after step 7 above is done, otherwise the\\n413: //     child goroutines may send errors back to already closed `errc` channel.\\n414: func (e *Etcd) Close() {\\n415: \\tfields := []zap.Field{\\n416: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"name\\\", e.cfg.Name),\\n417: \\t\\tzap.String(\\\"data-dir\\\", e.cfg.Dir),\\n418: \\t\\tzap.Strings(\\\"advertise-peer-urls\\\", e.cfg.getAdvertisePeerURLs()),\\n419: \\t\\tzap.Strings(\\\"advertise-client-urls\\\", e.cfg.getAdvertiseClientURLs()),\\n420: \\t}\\n421: \\tlg := e.GetLogger()\\n422: \\tlg.Info(\\\"closing etcd server\\\", fields...)\\n423: \\tdefer func() {\\n424: \\t\\tlg.Info(\\\"closed etcd server\\\", fields...)\\n425: \\t\\tverify.MustVerifyIfEnabled(verify.Config{\\n426: \\t\\t\\tLogger:     lg,\\n427: \\t\\t\\tDataDir:    e.cfg.Dir,\\n428: \\t\\t\\tExactIndex: false,\\n429: \\t\\t})\\n430: \\t\\tlg.Sync()\\n431: \\t}()\\n432: \\n433: \\te.closeOnce.Do(func() {\\n434: \\t\\tclose(e.stopc)\\n435: \\t})\\n436: \\n437: \\t// close client requests with request timeout\\n438: \\ttimeout := 2 * time.Second\\n439: \\tif e.Server != nil {\\n440: \\t\\ttimeout = e.Server.Cfg.ReqTimeout()\\n441: \\t}\\n442: \\tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\\n443: \\t\\tfor ss := range sctx.serversC {\\n444: \\t\\t\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)\\n445: \\t\\t\\tstopServers(ctx, ss)\\n446: \\t\\t\\tcancel()\\n447: \\t\\t}\\n448: \\t}\\n449: \\n450: \\tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\\n451: \\t\\tsctx.cancel()\\n452: \\t}\\n453: \\n454: \\tfor i := range e.Clients {\\n455: \\t\\tif e.Clients[i] != nil {\\n456: \\t\\t\\te.Clients[i].Close()\\n457: \\t\\t}\\n458: \\t}\\n459: \\n460: \\tfor i := range e.metricsListeners {\\n461: \\t\\te.metricsListeners[i].Close()\\n462: \\t}\\n463: \\n464: \\t// shutdown tracing exporter\\n465: \\tif e.tracingExporterShutdown != nil {\\n466: \\t\\te.tracingExporterShutdown()\\n467: \\t}\\n468: \\n469: \\t// close rafthttp transports\\n470: \\tif e.Server != nil {\\n471: \\t\\te.Server.Stop()\\n472: \\t}\\n473: \\n474: \\t// close all idle connections in peer handler (wait up to 1-second)\\n475: \\tfor i := range e.Peers {\\n476: \\t\\tif e.Peers[i] != nil && e.Peers[i].close != nil {\\n477: \\t\\t\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second)\\n478: \\t\\t\\te.Peers[i].close(ctx)\\n479: \\t\\t\\tcancel()\\n480: \\t\\t}\\n481: \\t}\\n482: \\tif e.errc != nil {\\n483: \\t\\te.wg.Wait()\\n484: \\t\\tclose(e.errc)\\n485: \\t}\\n486: }\\n487: \\n488: func stopServers(ctx context.Context, ss *servers) {\\n489: \\t// first, close the http.Server\\n490: \\tif ss.http != nil {\\n491: \\t\\tss.http.Shutdown(ctx)\\n492: \\t}\\n493: \\tif ss.grpc == nil {\\n494: \\t\\treturn\\n495: \\t}\\n496: \\t// do not grpc.Server.GracefulStop when grpc runs under http server\\n497: \\t// See https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/issues/1384#issuecomment-317124531\\n498: \\t// and https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/8916\\n499: \\tif ss.secure && ss.http != nil {\\n500: \\t\\tss.grpc.Stop()\\n501: \\t\\treturn\\n502: \\t}\\n503: \\n504: \\tch := make(chan struct{})\\n505: \\tgo func() {\\n506: \\t\\tdefer close(ch)\\n507: \\t\\t// close listeners to stop accepting new connections,\\n508: \\t\\t// will block on any existing transports\\n509: \\t\\tss.grpc.GracefulStop()\\n510: \\t}()\\n511: \\n512: \\t// wait until all pending RPCs are finished\\n513: \\tselect {\\n514: \\tcase <-ch:\\n515: \\tcase <-ctx.Done():\\n516: \\t\\t// took too long, manually close open transports\\n517: \\t\\t// e.g. watch streams\\n518: \\t\\tss.grpc.Stop()\\n519: \\n520: \\t\\t// concurrent GracefulStop should be interrupted\\n521: \\t\\t<-ch\\n522: \\t}\\n523: }\\n524: \\n525: // Err - return channel used to report errors during etcd run/shutdown.\\n526: // Since etcd 3.5 the channel is being closed when the etcd is over.\\n527: func (e *Etcd) Err() <-chan error {\\n528: \\treturn e.errc\\n529: }\\n530: \\n531: func configurePeerListeners(cfg *Config) (peers []*peerListener, err error) {\\n532: \\tif err = updateCipherSuites(&cfg.PeerTLSInfo, cfg.CipherSuites); err != nil {\\n533: \\t\\treturn nil, err\\n534: \\t}\\n535: \\tif err = cfg.PeerSelfCert(); err != nil {\\n536: \\t\\tcfg.logger.Fatal(\\\"failed to get peer self-signed certs\\\", zap.Error(err))\\n537: \\t}\\n538: \\tupdateMinMaxVersions(&cfg.PeerTLSInfo, cfg.TlsMinVersion, cfg.TlsMaxVersion)\\n539: \\tif !cfg.PeerTLSInfo.Empty() {\\n540: \\t\\tcfg.logger.Info(\\n541: \\t\\t\\t\\\"starting with peer TLS\\\",\\n542: \\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"tls-info\\\", fmt.Sprintf(\\\"%+v\\\", cfg.PeerTLSInfo)),\\n543: \\t\\t\\tzap.Strings(\\\"cipher-suites\\\", cfg.CipherSuites),\\n544: \\t\\t)\\n545: \\t}\\n546: \\n547: \\tpeers = make([]*peerListener, len(cfg.ListenPeerUrls))\\n548: \\tdefer func() {\\n549: \\t\\tif err == nil {\\n550: \\t\\t\\treturn\\n551: \\t\\t}\\n552: \\t\\tfor i := range peers {\\n553: \\t\\t\\tif peers[i] != nil && peers[i].close != nil {\\n554: \\t\\t\\t\\tcfg.logger.Warn(\\n555: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"closing peer listener\\\",\\n556: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"address\\\", cfg.ListenPeerUrls[i].String()),\\n557: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tzap.Error(err),\\n558: \\t\\t\\t\\t)\\n559: \\t\\t\\t\\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second)\\n560: \\t\\t\\t\\tpeers[i].close(ctx)\\n561: \\t\\t\\t\\tcancel()\\n562: \\t\\t\\t}\\n563: \\t\\t}\\n564: \\t}()\\n565: \\n566: \\tfor i, u := range cfg.ListenPeerUrls {\\n567: \\t\\tif u.Scheme == \\\"http\\\" {\\n568: \\t\\t\\tif !cfg.PeerTLSInfo.Empty() {\\n569: \\t\\t\\t\\tcfg.logger.Warn(\\\"scheme is HTTP while key and cert files are present; ignoring key and cert files\\\", zap.String(\\\"peer-url\\\", u.String()))\\n570: \\t\\t\\t}\\n571: \\t\\t\\tif cfg.PeerTLSInfo.ClientCertAuth {\\n572: \\t\\t\\t\\tcfg.logger.Warn(\\\"scheme is HTTP while --peer-client-cert-auth is enabled; ignoring client cert auth for this URL\\\", zap.String(\\\"peer-url\\\", u.String()))\\n573: \\t\\t\\t}\\n574: \\t\\t}\\n575: \\t\\tpeers[i] = &peerListener{close: func(context.Context) error { return nil }}\\n576: \\t\\tpeers[i].Listener, err = transport.NewListenerWithOpts(u.Host, u.Scheme,\\n577: \\t\\t\\ttransport.WithTLSInfo(&cfg.PeerTLSInfo),\\n578: \\t\\t\\ttransport.WithSocketOpts(&cfg.SocketOpts),\\n579: \\t\\t\\ttransport.WithTimeout(rafthttp.ConnReadTimeout, rafthttp.ConnWriteTimeout),\\n580: \\t\\t)\\n581: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n582: \\t\\t\\tcfg.logger.Error(\\\"creating peer listener failed\\\", zap.Error(err))\\n583: \\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n584: \\t\\t}\\n585: \\t\\t// once serve, overwrite with 'http.Server.Shutdown'\\n586: \\t\\tpeers[i].close = func(context.Context) error {\\n587: \\t\\t\\treturn peers[i].Listener.Close()\\n588: \\t\\t}\\n589: \\t}\\n590: \\treturn peers, nil\\n591: }\\n592: \\n593: // configure peer handlers after rafthttp.Transport started\\n594: func (e *Etcd) servePeers() {\\n595: \\tph := etcdhttp.NewPeerHandler(e.GetLogger(), e.Server)\\n596: \\n597: \\tfor _, p := range e.Peers {\\n598: \\t\\tu := p.Listener.Addr().String()\\n599: \\t\\tm := cmux.New(p.Listener)\\n600: \\t\\tsrv := &http.Server{\\n601: \\t\\t\\tHandler:     ph,\\n602: \\t\\t\\tReadTimeout: 5 * time.Minute,\\n603: \\t\\t\\tErrorLog:    defaultLog.New(io.Discard, \\\"\\\", 0), // do not log user error\\n604: \\t\\t}\\n605: \\t\\tgo srv.Serve(m.Match(cmux.Any()))\\n606: \\t\\tp.serve = func() error {\\n607: \\t\\t\\te.cfg.logger.Info(\\n608: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"cmux::serve\\\",\\n609: \\t\\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"address\\\", u),\\n610: \\t\\t\\t)\\n611: \\t\\t\\treturn m.Serve()\\n612: \\t\\t}\\n613: \\t\\tp.close = func(ctx context.Context) error {\\n614: \\t\\t\\t// gracefully shutdown http.Server\\n615: \\t\\t\\t// close open listeners, idle connections\\n616: \\t\\t\\t// until context cancel or time-out\\n617: \\t\\t\\te.cfg.logger.Info(\\n618: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"stopping serving peer traffic\\\",\\n619: \\t\\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"address\\\", u),\\n620: \\t\\t\\t)\\n621: \\t\\t\\tsrv.Shutdown(ctx)\\n622: \\t\\t\\te.cfg.logger.Info(\\n623: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"stopped serving peer traffic\\\",\\n624: \\t\\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"address\\\", u),\\n625: \\t\\t\\t)\\n626: \\t\\t\\tm.Close()\\n627: \\t\\t\\treturn nil\\n628: \\t\\t}\\n629: \\t}\\n630: \\n631: \\t// start peer servers in a goroutine\\n632: \\tfor _, pl := range e.Peers {\\n633: \\t\\tl := pl\\n634: \\t\\te.startHandler(func() error {\\n635: \\t\\t\\tu := l.Addr().String()\\n636: \\t\\t\\te.cfg.logger.Info(\\n637: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"serving peer traffic\\\",\\n638: \\t\\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"address\\\", u),\\n639: \\t\\t\\t)\\n640: \\t\\t\\treturn l.serve()\\n641: \\t\\t})\\n642: \\t}\\n643: }\\n644: \\n645: func configureClientListeners(cfg *Config) (sctxs map[string]*serveCtx, err error) {\\n646: \\tif err = updateCipherSuites(&cfg.ClientTLSInfo, cfg.CipherSuites); err != nil {\\n647: \\t\\treturn nil, err\\n648: \\t}\\n649: \\tif err = cfg.ClientSelfCert(); err != nil {\\n650: \\t\\tcfg.logger.Fatal(\\\"failed to get client self-signed certs\\\", zap.Error(err))\\n651: \\t}\\n652: \\tupdateMinMaxVersions(&cfg.ClientTLSInfo, cfg.TlsMinVersion, cfg.TlsMaxVersion)\\n653: \\tif cfg.EnablePprof {\\n654: \\t\\tcfg.logger.Info(\\\"pprof is enabled\\\", zap.String(\\\"path\\\", debugutil.HTTPPrefixPProf))\\n655: \\t}\\n656: \\n657: \\tsctxs = make(map[string]*serveCtx)\\n658: \\tfor _, u := range append(cfg.ListenClientUrls, cfg.ListenClientHttpUrls...) {\\n659: \\t\\tif u.Scheme == \\\"http\\\" || u.Scheme == \\\"unix\\\" {\\n660: \\t\\t\\tif !cfg.ClientTLSInfo.Empty() {\\n661: \\t\\t\\t\\tcfg.logger.Warn(\\\"scheme is http or unix while key and cert files are present; ignoring key and cert files\\\", zap.String(\\\"client-url\\\", u.String()))\\n662: \\t\\t\\t}\\n663: \\t\\t\\tif cfg.ClientTLSInfo.ClientCertAuth {\\n664: \\t\\t\\t\\tcfg.logger.Warn(\\\"scheme is http or unix while --client-cert-auth is enabled; ignoring client cert auth for this URL\\\", zap.String(\\\"client-url\\\", u.String()))\\n665: \\t\\t\\t}\\n666: \\t\\t}\\n667: \\t\\tif (u.Scheme == \\\"https\\\" || u.Scheme == \\\"unixs\\\") && cfg.ClientTLSInfo.Empty() {\\n668: \\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"TLS key/cert (--cert-file, --key-file) must be provided for client url %s with HTTPS scheme\\\", u.String())\\n669: \\t\\t}\\n670: \\t}\\n671: \\n672: \\tfor _, u := range cfg.ListenClientUrls {\\n673: \\t\\taddr, secure, network := resolveURL(u)\\n674: \\t\\tsctx := sctxs[addr]\\n675: \\t\\tif sctx == nil {\\n676: \\t\\t\\tsctx = newServeCtx(cfg.logger)\\n677: \\t\\t\\tsctxs[addr] = sctx\\n678: \\t\\t}\\n679: \\t\\tsctx.secure = sctx.secure || secure\\n680: \\t\\tsctx.insecure = sctx.insecure || !secure\\n681: \\t\\tsctx.scheme = u.Scheme\\n682: \\t\\tsctx.addr = addr\\n683: \\t\\tsctx.network = network\\n684: \\t}\\n685: \\tfor _, u := range cfg.ListenClientHttpUrls {\\n686: \\t\\taddr, secure, network := resolveURL(u)\\n687: \\n688: \\t\\tsctx := sctxs[addr]\\n689: \\t\\tif sctx == nil {\\n690: \\t\\t\\tsctx = newServeCtx(cfg.logger)\\n691: \\t\\t\\tsctxs[addr] = sctx\\n692: \\t\\t} else if !sctx.httpOnly {\\n693: \\t\\t\\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\\\"cannot bind both --listen-client-urls and --listen-client-http-urls on the same url %s\\\", u.String())\\n694: \\t\\t}\\n695: \\t\\tsctx.secure = sctx.secure || secure\\n696: \\t\\tsctx.insecure = sctx.insecure || !secure\\n697: \\t\\tsctx.scheme = u.Scheme\\n698: \\t\\tsctx.addr = addr\\n699: \\t\\tsctx.network = network\\n700: \\t\\tsctx.httpOnly = true\\n701: \\t}\\n702: \\n703: \\tfor _, sctx := range sctxs {\\n704: \\t\\tif sctx.l, err = transport.NewListenerWithOpts(sctx.addr, sctx.scheme,\\n705: \\t\\t\\ttransport.WithSocketOpts(&cfg.SocketOpts),\\n706: \\t\\t\\ttransport.WithSkipTLSInfoCheck(true),\\n707: \\t\\t); err != nil {\\n708: \\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n709: \\t\\t}\\n710: \\t\\t// net.Listener will rewrite ipv4 0.0.0.0 to ipv6 [::], breaking\\n711: \\t\\t// hosts that disable ipv6. So, use the address given by the user.\\n712: \\n713: \\t\\tif fdLimit, fderr := runtimeutil.FDLimit(); fderr == nil {\\n714: \\t\\t\\tif fdLimit <= reservedInternalFDNum {\\n715: \\t\\t\\t\\tcfg.logger.Fatal(\\n716: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"file descriptor limit of etcd process is too low; please set higher\\\",\\n717: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tzap.Uint64(\\\"limit\\\", fdLimit),\\n718: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tzap.Int(\\\"recommended-limit\\\", reservedInternalFDNum),\\n719: \\t\\t\\t\\t)\\n720: \\t\\t\\t}\\n721: \\t\\t\\tsctx.l = transport.LimitListener(sctx.l, int(fdLimit-reservedInternalFDNum))\\n722: \\t\\t}\\n723: \\n724: \\t\\tdefer func(sctx *serveCtx) {\\n725: \\t\\t\\tif err == nil || sctx.l == nil {\\n726: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn\\n727: \\t\\t\\t}\\n728: \\t\\t\\tsctx.l.Close()\\n729: \\t\\t\\tcfg.logger.Warn(\\n730: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"closing peer listener\\\",\\n731: \\t\\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"address\\\", sctx.addr),\\n732: \\t\\t\\t\\tzap.Error(err),\\n733: \\t\\t\\t)\\n734: \\t\\t}(sctx)\\n735: \\t\\tfor k := range cfg.UserHandlers {\\n736: \\t\\t\\tsctx.userHandlers[k] = cfg.UserHandlers[k]\\n737: \\t\\t}\\n738: \\t\\tsctx.serviceRegister = cfg.ServiceRegister\\n739: \\t\\tif cfg.EnablePprof || cfg.LogLevel == \\\"debug\\\" {\\n740: \\t\\t\\tsctx.registerPprof()\\n741: \\t\\t}\\n742: \\t\\tif cfg.LogLevel == \\\"debug\\\" {\\n743: \\t\\t\\tsctx.registerTrace()\\n744: \\t\\t}\\n745: \\t}\\n746: \\treturn sctxs, nil\\n747: }\\n748: \\n749: func resolveURL(u url.URL) (addr string, secure bool, network string) {\\n750: \\taddr = u.Host\\n751: \\tnetwork = \\\"tcp\\\"\\n752: \\tif u.Scheme == \\\"unix\\\" || u.Scheme == \\\"unixs\\\" {\\n753: \\t\\taddr = u.Host + u.Path\\n754: \\t\\tnetwork = \\\"unix\\\"\\n755: \\t}\\n756: \\tsecure = u.Scheme == \\\"https\\\" || u.Scheme == \\\"unixs\\\"\\n757: \\treturn addr, secure, network\\n758: }\\n759: \\n760: func (e *Etcd) serveClients() {\\n761: \\tif !e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo.Empty() {\\n762: \\t\\te.cfg.logger.Info(\\n763: \\t\\t\\t\\\"starting with client TLS\\\",\\n764: \\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"tls-info\\\", fmt.Sprintf(\\\"%+v\\\", e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo)),\\n765: \\t\\t\\tzap.Strings(\\\"cipher-suites\\\", e.cfg.CipherSuites),\\n766: \\t\\t)\\n767: \\t}\\n768: \\n769: \\t// Start a client server goroutine for each listen address\\n770: \\tmux := http.NewServeMux()\\n771: \\tetcdhttp.HandleDebug(mux)\\n772: \\tetcdhttp.HandleVersion(mux, e.Server)\\n773: \\tetcdhttp.HandleMetrics(mux)\\n774: \\tetcdhttp.HandleHealth(e.cfg.logger, mux, e.Server)\\n775: \\n776: \\tvar gopts []grpc.ServerOption\\n777: \\tif e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveMinTime > time.Duration(0) {\\n778: \\t\\tgopts = append(gopts, grpc.KeepaliveEnforcementPolicy(keepalive.EnforcementPolicy{\\n779: \\t\\t\\tMinTime:             e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveMinTime,\\n780: \\t\\t\\tPermitWithoutStream: false,\\n781: \\t\\t}))\\n782: \\t}\\n783: \\tif e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveInterval > time.Duration(0) &&\\n784: \\t\\te.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveTimeout > time.Duration(0) {\\n785: \\t\\tgopts = append(gopts, grpc.KeepaliveParams(keepalive.ServerParameters{\\n786: \\t\\t\\tTime:    e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveInterval,\\n787: \\t\\t\\tTimeout: e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveTimeout,\\n788: \\t\\t}))\\n789: \\t}\\n790: \\tgopts = append(gopts, e.cfg.GRPCAdditionalServerOptions...)\\n791: \\n792: \\tsplitHTTP := false\\n793: \\tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\\n794: \\t\\tif sctx.httpOnly {\\n795: \\t\\t\\tsplitHTTP = true\\n796: \\t\\t}\\n797: \\t}\\n798: \\n799: \\t// start client servers in each goroutine\\n800: \\tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\\n801: \\t\\ts := sctx\\n802: \\t\\te.startHandler(func() error {\\n803: \\t\\t\\treturn s.serve(e.Server, &e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo, mux, e.errHandler, e.grpcGatewayDial(splitHTTP), splitHTTP, gopts...)\\n804: \\t\\t})\\n805: \\t}\\n806: }\\n807: \\n808: func (e *Etcd) grpcGatewayDial(splitHTTP bool) (grpcDial func(ctx context.Context) (*grpc.ClientConn, error)) {\\n809: \\tif !e.cfg.EnableGRPCGateway {\\n810: \\t\\treturn nil\\n811: \\t}\\n812: \\tsctx := e.pickGRPCGatewayServeContext(splitHTTP)\\n813: \\taddr := sctx.addr\\n814: \\tif network := sctx.network; network == \\\"unix\\\" {\\n815: \\t\\t// explicitly define unix network for gRPC socket support\\n816: \\t\\taddr = fmt.Sprintf(\\\"%s:%s\\\", network, addr)\\n817: \\t}\\n818: \\topts := []grpc.DialOption{grpc.WithDefaultCallOptions(grpc.MaxCallRecvMsgSize(math.MaxInt32))}\\n819: \\tif sctx.secure {\\n820: \\t\\ttlscfg, tlsErr := e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo.ServerConfig()\\n821: \\t\\tif tlsErr != nil {\\n822: \\t\\t\\treturn func(ctx context.Context) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {\\n823: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn nil, tlsErr\\n824: \\t\\t\\t}\\n825: \\t\\t}\\n826: \\t\\tdtls := tlscfg.Clone()\\n827: \\t\\t// trust local server\\n828: \\t\\tdtls.InsecureSkipVerify = true\\n829: \\t\\topts = append(opts, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(credentials.NewTransportCredential(dtls)))\\n830: \\t} else {\\n831: \\t\\topts = append(opts, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()))\\n832: \\t}\\n833: \\n834: \\treturn func(ctx context.Context) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {\\n835: \\t\\tconn, err := grpc.DialContext(ctx, addr, opts...) //nolint:staticcheck // TODO: remove for a supported version\\n836: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n837: \\t\\t\\tsctx.lg.Error(\\\"grpc gateway failed to dial\\\", zap.String(\\\"addr\\\", addr), zap.Error(err))\\n838: \\t\\t\\treturn nil, err\\n839: \\t\\t}\\n840: \\t\\treturn conn, err\\n841: \\t}\\n842: }\\n843: \\n844: func (e *Etcd) pickGRPCGatewayServeContext(splitHTTP bool) *serveCtx {\\n845: \\tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\\n846: \\t\\tif !splitHTTP || !sctx.httpOnly {\\n847: \\t\\t\\treturn sctx\\n848: \\t\\t}\\n849: \\t}\\n850: \\tpanic(\\\"Expect at least one context able to serve grpc\\\")\\n851: }\\n852: \\n853: var ErrMissingClientTLSInfoForMetricsURL = errors.New(\\\"client TLS key/cert (--cert-file, --key-file) must be provided for metrics secure url\\\")\\n854: \\n855: func (e *Etcd) createMetricsListener(murl url.URL) (net.Listener, error) {\\n856: \\ttlsInfo := &e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo\\n857: \\tswitch murl.Scheme {\\n858: \\tcase \\\"http\\\":\\n859: \\t\\ttlsInfo = nil\\n860: \\tcase \\\"https\\\", \\\"unixs\\\":\\n861: \\t\\tif e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo.Empty() {\\n862: \\t\\t\\treturn nil, ErrMissingClientTLSInfoForMetricsURL\\n863: \\t\\t}\\n864: \\t}\\n865: \\treturn transport.NewListenerWithOpts(murl.Host, murl.Scheme,\\n866: \\t\\ttransport.WithTLSInfo(tlsInfo),\\n867: \\t\\ttransport.WithSocketOpts(&e.cfg.SocketOpts),\\n868: \\t)\\n869: }\\n870: \\n871: func (e *Etcd) serveMetrics() (err error) {\\n872: \\tif len(e.cfg.ListenMetricsUrls) > 0 {\\n873: \\t\\tmetricsMux := http.NewServeMux()\\n874: \\t\\tetcdhttp.HandleMetrics(metricsMux)\\n875: \\t\\tetcdhttp.HandleHealth(e.cfg.logger, metricsMux, e.Server)\\n876: \\n877: \\t\\tfor _, murl := range e.cfg.ListenMetricsUrls {\\n878: \\t\\t\\tu := murl\\n879: \\t\\t\\tml, err := e.createMetricsListener(murl)\\n880: \\t\\t\\tif err != nil {\\n881: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn err\\n882: \\t\\t\\t}\\n883: \\t\\t\\te.metricsListeners = append(e.metricsListeners, ml)\\n884: \\n885: \\t\\t\\te.startHandler(func() error {\\n886: \\t\\t\\t\\te.cfg.logger.Info(\\n887: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\t\\\"serving metrics\\\",\\n888: \\t\\t\\t\\t\\tzap.String(\\\"address\\\", u.String()),\\n889: \\t\\t\\t\\t)\\n890: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn http.Serve(ml, metricsMux)\\n891: \\t\\t\\t})\\n892: \\t\\t}\\n893: \\t}\\n894: \\treturn nil\\n895: }\\n896: \\n897: func (e *Etcd) startHandler(handler func() error) {\\n898: \\t// start each handler in a separate goroutine\\n899: \\te.wg.Add(1)\\n900: \\tgo func() {\\n901: \\t\\tdefer e.wg.Done()\\n902: \\t\\te.errHandler(handler())\\n903: \\t}()\\n904: }\\n905: \\n906: func (e *Etcd) errHandler(err error) {\\n907: \\tif err != nil {\\n908: \\t\\te.GetLogger().Error(\\\"setting up serving from embedded etcd failed.\\\", zap.Error(err))\\n909: \\t}\\n910: \\tselect {\\n911: \\tcase <-e.stopc:\\n912: \\t\\treturn\\n913: \\tdefault:\\n914: \\t}\\n915: \\tselect {\\n916: \\tcase <-e.stopc:\\n917: \\tcase e.errc <- err:\\n918: \\t}\\n919: }\\n920: \\n921: // GetLogger returns the logger.\\n922: func (e *Etcd) GetLogger() *zap.Logger {\\n923: \\te.cfg.loggerMu.RLock()\\n924: \\tl := e.cfg.logger\\n925: \\te.cfg.loggerMu.RUnlock()\\n926: \\treturn l\\n927: }\\n928: \\n929: func parseCompactionRetention(mode, retention string) (ret time.Duration, err error) {\\n930: \\th, err := strconv.Atoi(retention)\\n931: \\tif err == nil && h >= 0 {\\n932: \\t\\tswitch mode {\\n933: \\t\\tcase CompactorModeRevision:\\n934: \\t\\t\\tret = time.Duration(int64(h))\\n935: \\t\\tcase CompactorModePeriodic:\\n936: \\t\\t\\tret = time.Duration(int64(h)) * time.Hour\\n937: \\t\\tcase \\\"\\\":\\n938: \\t\\t\\treturn 0, errors.New(\\\"--auto-compaction-mode is undefined\\\")\\n939: \\t\\t}\\n940: \\t} else {\\n941: \\t\\t// periodic compaction\\n942: \\t\\tret, err = time.ParseDuration(retention)\\n943: \\t\\tif err != nil {\\n944: \\t\\t\\treturn 0, fmt.Errorf(\\\"error parsing CompactionRetention: %w\\\", err)\\n945: \\t\\t}\\n946: \\t}\\n947: \\treturn ret, nil\\n948: }\\n949: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/etcd--d89978e8@d89978e8e32196a3d7410690ebed1d94baf32dbe/-/blob/server/embed/etcd.go\"}",
  "structuredContent": {
    "content": "1: // Copyright 2016 The etcd Authors\n2: //\n3: // Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n4: // you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n5: // You may obtain a copy of the License at\n6: //\n7: //     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n8: //\n9: // Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n10: // distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n11: // WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n12: // See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n13: // limitations under the License.\n14: \n15: package embed\n16: \n17: import (\n18: \t\"context\"\n19: \t\"errors\"\n20: \t\"fmt\"\n21: \t\"io\"\n22: \tdefaultLog \"log\"\n23: \t\"math\"\n24: \t\"net\"\n25: \t\"net/http\"\n26: \t\"net/url\"\n27: \t\"runtime\"\n28: \t\"sort\"\n29: \t\"strconv\"\n30: \t\"strings\"\n31: \t\"sync\"\n32: \t\"time\"\n33: \n34: \t\"github.com/soheilhy/cmux\"\n35: \t\"go.uber.org/zap\"\n36: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n37: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc/credentials/insecure\"\n38: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc/keepalive\"\n39: \n40: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/api/v3/version\"\n41: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/client/pkg/v3/transport\"\n42: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/client/pkg/v3/types\"\n43: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/client/v3/credentials\"\n44: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/pkg/v3/debugutil\"\n45: \truntimeutil \"go.etcd.io/etcd/pkg/v3/runtime\"\n46: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/server/v3/config\"\n47: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/server/v3/etcdserver\"\n48: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/server/v3/etcdserver/api/etcdhttp\"\n49: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/server/v3/etcdserver/api/rafthttp\"\n50: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/server/v3/features\"\n51: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/server/v3/storage\"\n52: \t\"go.etcd.io/etcd/server/v3/verify\"\n53: )\n54: \n55: const (\n56: \t// internal fd usage includes disk usage and transport usage.\n57: \t// To read/write snapshot, snap pkg needs 1. In normal case, wal pkg needs\n58: \t// at most 2 to read/lock/write WALs. One case that it needs to 2 is to\n59: \t// read all logs after some snapshot index, which locates at the end of\n60: \t// the second last and the head of the last. For purging, it needs to read\n61: \t// directory, so it needs 1. For fd monitor, it needs 1.\n62: \t// For transport, rafthttp builds two long-polling connections and at most\n63: \t// four temporary connections with each member. There are at most 9 members\n64: \t// in a cluster, so it should reserve 96.\n65: \t// For the safety, we set the total reserved number to 150.\n66: \treservedInternalFDNum = 150\n67: )\n68: \n69: // Etcd contains a running etcd server and its listeners.\n70: type Etcd struct {\n71: \tPeers   []*peerListener\n72: \tClients []net.Listener\n73: \t// a map of contexts for the servers that serves client requests.\n74: \tsctxs            map[string]*serveCtx\n75: \tmetricsListeners []net.Listener\n76: \n77: \ttracingExporterShutdown func()\n78: \n79: \tServer *etcdserver.EtcdServer\n80: \n81: \tcfg Config\n82: \n83: \t// closeOnce is to ensure `stopc` is closed only once, no matter\n84: \t// how many times the Close() method is called.\n85: \tcloseOnce sync.Once\n86: \t// stopc is used to notify the sub goroutines not to send\n87: \t// any errors to `errc`.\n88: \tstopc chan struct{}\n89: \t// errc is used to receive error from sub goroutines (including\n90: \t// client handler, peer handler and metrics handler). It's closed\n91: \t// after all these sub goroutines exit (checked via `wg`). Writers\n92: \t// should avoid writing after `stopc` is closed by selecting on\n93: \t// reading from `stopc`.\n94: \terrc chan error\n95: \n96: \t// wg is used to track the lifecycle of all sub goroutines which\n97: \t// need to send error back to the `errc`.\n98: \twg sync.WaitGroup\n99: }\n100: \n101: type peerListener struct {\n102: \tnet.Listener\n103: \tserve func() error\n104: \tclose func(context.Context) error\n105: }\n106: \n107: // StartEtcd launches the etcd server and HTTP handlers for client/server communication.\n108: // The returned Etcd.Server is not guaranteed to have joined the cluster. Wait\n109: // on the Etcd.Server.ReadyNotify() channel to know when it completes and is ready for use.\n110: func StartEtcd(inCfg *Config) (e *Etcd, err error) {\n111: \tif err = inCfg.Validate(); err != nil {\n112: \t\treturn nil, err\n113: \t}\n114: \tserving := false\n115: \te = &Etcd{cfg: *inCfg, stopc: make(chan struct{})}\n116: \tcfg := &e.cfg\n117: \tdefer func() {\n118: \t\tif e == nil || err == nil {\n119: \t\t\treturn\n120: \t\t}\n121: \t\tif !serving {\n122: \t\t\t// errored before starting gRPC server for serveCtx.serversC\n123: \t\t\tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\n124: \t\t\t\tsctx.close()\n125: \t\t\t}\n126: \t\t}\n127: \t\te.Close()\n128: \t\te = nil\n129: \t}()\n130: \n131: \tif !cfg.SocketOpts.Empty() {\n132: \t\tcfg.logger.Info(\n133: \t\t\t\"configuring socket options\",\n134: \t\t\tzap.Bool(\"reuse-address\", cfg.SocketOpts.ReuseAddress),\n135: \t\t\tzap.Bool(\"reuse-port\", cfg.SocketOpts.ReusePort),\n136: \t\t)\n137: \t}\n138: \te.cfg.logger.Info(\n139: \t\t\"configuring peer listeners\",\n140: \t\tzap.Strings(\"listen-peer-urls\", e.cfg.getListenPeerURLs()),\n141: \t)\n142: \tif e.Peers, err = configurePeerListeners(cfg); err != nil {\n143: \t\treturn e, err\n144: \t}\n145: \n146: \te.cfg.logger.Info(\n147: \t\t\"configuring client listeners\",\n148: \t\tzap.Strings(\"listen-client-urls\", e.cfg.getListenClientURLs()),\n149: \t)\n150: \tif e.sctxs, err = configureClientListeners(cfg); err != nil {\n151: \t\treturn e, err\n152: \t}\n153: \n154: \tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\n155: \t\te.Clients = append(e.Clients, sctx.l)\n156: \t}\n157: \n158: \tvar (\n159: \t\turlsmap types.URLsMap\n160: \t\ttoken   string\n161: \t)\n162: \tmemberInitialized := true\n163: \tif !isMemberInitialized(cfg) {\n164: \t\tmemberInitialized = false\n165: \t\turlsmap, token, err = cfg.PeerURLsMapAndToken(\"etcd\")\n166: \t\tif err != nil {\n167: \t\t\treturn e, fmt.Errorf(\"error setting up initial cluster: %w\", err)\n168: \t\t}\n169: \t}\n170: \n171: \t// AutoCompactionRetention defaults to \"0\" if not set.\n172: \tif len(cfg.AutoCompactionRetention) == 0 {\n173: \t\tcfg.AutoCompactionRetention = \"0\"\n174: \t}\n175: \tautoCompactionRetention, err := parseCompactionRetention(cfg.AutoCompactionMode, cfg.AutoCompactionRetention)\n176: \tif err != nil {\n177: \t\treturn e, err\n178: \t}\n179: \n180: \tbackendFreelistType := parseBackendFreelistType(cfg.BackendFreelistType)\n181: \n182: \tsrvcfg := config.ServerConfig{\n183: \t\tName:                              cfg.Name,\n184: \t\tClientURLs:                        cfg.AdvertiseClientUrls,\n185: \t\tPeerURLs:                          cfg.AdvertisePeerUrls,\n186: \t\tDataDir:                           cfg.Dir,\n187: \t\tDedicatedWALDir:                   cfg.WalDir,\n188: \t\tSnapshotCount:                     cfg.SnapshotCount,\n189: \t\tSnapshotCatchUpEntries:            cfg.SnapshotCatchUpEntries,\n190: \t\tMaxSnapFiles:                      cfg.MaxSnapFiles,\n191: \t\tMaxWALFiles:                       cfg.MaxWalFiles,\n192: \t\tInitialPeerURLsMap:                urlsmap,\n193: \t\tInitialClusterToken:               token,\n194: \t\tDiscoveryCfg:                      cfg.DiscoveryCfg,\n195: \t\tNewCluster:                        cfg.IsNewCluster(),\n196: \t\tPeerTLSInfo:                       cfg.PeerTLSInfo,\n197: \t\tTickMs:                            cfg.TickMs,\n198: \t\tElectionTicks:                     cfg.ElectionTicks(),\n199: \t\tInitialElectionTickAdvance:        cfg.InitialElectionTickAdvance,\n200: \t\tAutoCompactionRetention:           autoCompactionRetention,\n201: \t\tAutoCompactionMode:                cfg.AutoCompactionMode,\n202: \t\tQuotaBackendBytes:                 cfg.QuotaBackendBytes,\n203: \t\tBackendBatchLimit:                 cfg.BackendBatchLimit,\n204: \t\tBackendFreelistType:               backendFreelistType,\n205: \t\tBackendBatchInterval:              cfg.BackendBatchInterval,\n206: \t\tMaxTxnOps:                         cfg.MaxTxnOps,\n207: \t\tMaxRequestBytes:                   cfg.MaxRequestBytes,\n208: \t\tMaxConcurrentStreams:              cfg.MaxConcurrentStreams,\n209: \t\tSocketOpts:                        cfg.SocketOpts,\n210: \t\tStrictReconfigCheck:               cfg.StrictReconfigCheck,\n211: \t\tClientCertAuthEnabled:             cfg.ClientTLSInfo.ClientCertAuth,\n212: \t\tAuthToken:                         cfg.AuthToken,\n213: \t\tBcryptCost:                        cfg.BcryptCost,\n214: \t\tTokenTTL:                          cfg.AuthTokenTTL,\n215: \t\tCORS:                              cfg.CORS,\n216: \t\tHostWhitelist:                     cfg.HostWhitelist,\n217: \t\tCorruptCheckTime:                  cfg.CorruptCheckTime,\n218: \t\tCompactHashCheckTime:              cfg.CompactHashCheckTime,\n219: \t\tPreVote:                           cfg.PreVote,\n220: \t\tLogger:                            cfg.logger,\n221: \t\tForceNewCluster:                   cfg.ForceNewCluster,\n222: \t\tEnableGRPCGateway:                 cfg.EnableGRPCGateway,\n223: \t\tEnableDistributedTracing:          cfg.EnableDistributedTracing,\n224: \t\tUnsafeNoFsync:                     cfg.UnsafeNoFsync,\n225: \t\tCompactionBatchLimit:              cfg.CompactionBatchLimit,\n226: \t\tCompactionSleepInterval:           cfg.CompactionSleepInterval,\n227: \t\tWatchProgressNotifyInterval:       cfg.WatchProgressNotifyInterval,\n228: \t\tDowngradeCheckTime:                cfg.DowngradeCheckTime,\n229: \t\tWarningApplyDuration:              cfg.WarningApplyDuration,\n230: \t\tWarningUnaryRequestDuration:       cfg.WarningUnaryRequestDuration,\n231: \t\tMemoryMlock:                       cfg.MemoryMlock,\n232: \t\tBootstrapDefragThresholdMegabytes: cfg.BootstrapDefragThresholdMegabytes,\n233: \t\tMaxLearners:                       cfg.MaxLearners,\n234: \t\tV2Deprecation:                     cfg.V2DeprecationEffective(),\n235: \t\tLocalAddress:                      cfg.InferLocalAddr(),\n236: \t\tServerFeatureGate:                 cfg.ServerFeatureGate,\n237: \t\tMetrics:                           cfg.Metrics,\n238: \t}\n239: \n240: \tif srvcfg.EnableDistributedTracing {\n241: \t\ttctx := context.Background()\n242: \t\ttracingExporter, terr := newTracingExporter(tctx, cfg)\n243: \t\tif terr != nil {\n244: \t\t\treturn e, terr\n245: \t\t}\n246: \t\te.tracingExporterShutdown = func() {\n247: \t\t\ttracingExporter.Close(tctx)\n248: \t\t}\n249: \t\tsrvcfg.TracerOptions = tracingExporter.opts\n250: \n251: \t\te.cfg.logger.Info(\n252: \t\t\t\"distributed tracing setup enabled\",\n253: \t\t)\n254: \t}\n255: \n256: \tsrvcfg.PeerTLSInfo.LocalAddr = srvcfg.LocalAddress\n257: \n258: \tprint(e.cfg.logger, *cfg, srvcfg, memberInitialized)\n259: \n260: \tif e.Server, err = etcdserver.NewServer(srvcfg); err != nil {\n261: \t\treturn e, err\n262: \t}\n263: \n264: \t// buffer channel so goroutines on closed connections won't wait forever\n265: \te.errc = make(chan error, len(e.Peers)+len(e.Clients)+2*len(e.sctxs))\n266: \n267: \t// newly started member (\"memberInitialized==false\")\n268: \t// does not need corruption check\n269: \tif memberInitialized && srvcfg.ServerFeatureGate.Enabled(features.InitialCorruptCheck) {\n270: \t\tif err = e.Server.CorruptionChecker().InitialCheck(); err != nil {\n271: \t\t\t// set \"EtcdServer\" to nil, so that it does not block on \"EtcdServer.Close()\"\n272: \t\t\t// (nothing to close since rafthttp transports have not been started)\n273: \n274: \t\t\te.cfg.logger.Error(\"checkInitialHashKV failed\", zap.Error(err))\n275: \t\t\te.Server.Cleanup()\n276: \t\t\te.Server = nil\n277: \t\t\treturn e, err\n278: \t\t}\n279: \t}\n280: \te.Server.Start()\n281: \n282: \te.servePeers()\n283: \n284: \te.serveClients()\n285: \n286: \tif err = e.serveMetrics(); err != nil {\n287: \t\treturn e, err\n288: \t}\n289: \n290: \te.cfg.logger.Info(\n291: \t\t\"now serving peer/client/metrics\",\n292: \t\tzap.String(\"local-member-id\", e.Server.MemberID().String()),\n293: \t\tzap.Strings(\"initial-advertise-peer-urls\", e.cfg.getAdvertisePeerURLs()),\n294: \t\tzap.Strings(\"listen-peer-urls\", e.cfg.getListenPeerURLs()),\n295: \t\tzap.Strings(\"advertise-client-urls\", e.cfg.getAdvertiseClientURLs()),\n296: \t\tzap.Strings(\"listen-client-urls\", e.cfg.getListenClientURLs()),\n297: \t\tzap.Strings(\"listen-metrics-urls\", e.cfg.getMetricsURLs()),\n298: \t)\n299: \tserving = true\n300: \treturn e, nil\n301: }\n302: \n303: func print(lg *zap.Logger, ec Config, sc config.ServerConfig, memberInitialized bool) {\n304: \tcors := make([]string, 0, len(ec.CORS))\n305: \tfor v := range ec.CORS {\n306: \t\tcors = append(cors, v)\n307: \t}\n308: \tsort.Strings(cors)\n309: \n310: \thss := make([]string, 0, len(ec.HostWhitelist))\n311: \tfor v := range ec.HostWhitelist {\n312: \t\thss = append(hss, v)\n313: \t}\n314: \tsort.Strings(hss)\n315: \n316: \tquota := ec.QuotaBackendBytes\n317: \tif quota == 0 {\n318: \t\tquota = storage.DefaultQuotaBytes\n319: \t}\n320: \n321: \tlg.Info(\n322: \t\t\"starting an etcd server\",\n323: \t\tzap.String(\"etcd-version\", version.Version),\n324: \t\tzap.String(\"git-sha\", version.GitSHA),\n325: \t\tzap.String(\"go-version\", runtime.Version()),\n326: \t\tzap.String(\"go-os\", runtime.GOOS),\n327: \t\tzap.String(\"go-arch\", runtime.GOARCH),\n328: \t\tzap.Int(\"max-cpu-set\", runtime.GOMAXPROCS(0)),\n329: \t\tzap.Int(\"max-cpu-available\", runtime.NumCPU()),\n330: \t\tzap.Bool(\"member-initialized\", memberInitialized),\n331: \t\tzap.String(\"name\", sc.Name),\n332: \t\tzap.String(\"data-dir\", sc.DataDir),\n333: \t\tzap.String(\"wal-dir\", ec.WalDir),\n334: \t\tzap.String(\"wal-dir-dedicated\", sc.DedicatedWALDir),\n335: \t\tzap.String(\"member-dir\", sc.MemberDir()),\n336: \t\tzap.Bool(\"force-new-cluster\", sc.ForceNewCluster),\n337: \t\tzap.String(\"heartbeat-interval\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%v\", time.Duration(sc.TickMs)*time.Millisecond)),\n338: \t\tzap.String(\"election-timeout\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%v\", time.Duration(sc.ElectionTicks*int(sc.TickMs))*time.Millisecond)),\n339: \t\tzap.Bool(\"initial-election-tick-advance\", sc.InitialElectionTickAdvance),\n340: \t\tzap.Uint64(\"snapshot-count\", sc.SnapshotCount),\n341: \t\tzap.Uint(\"max-wals\", sc.MaxWALFiles),\n342: \t\tzap.Uint(\"max-snapshots\", sc.MaxSnapFiles),\n343: \t\tzap.Uint64(\"snapshot-catchup-entries\", sc.SnapshotCatchUpEntries),\n344: \t\tzap.Strings(\"initial-advertise-peer-urls\", ec.getAdvertisePeerURLs()),\n345: \t\tzap.Strings(\"listen-peer-urls\", ec.getListenPeerURLs()),\n346: \t\tzap.Strings(\"advertise-client-urls\", ec.getAdvertiseClientURLs()),\n347: \t\tzap.Strings(\"listen-client-urls\", ec.getListenClientURLs()),\n348: \t\tzap.Strings(\"listen-metrics-urls\", ec.getMetricsURLs()),\n349: \t\tzap.String(\"local-address\", sc.LocalAddress),\n350: \t\tzap.Strings(\"cors\", cors),\n351: \t\tzap.Strings(\"host-whitelist\", hss),\n352: \t\tzap.String(\"initial-cluster\", sc.InitialPeerURLsMap.String()),\n353: \t\tzap.String(\"initial-cluster-state\", ec.ClusterState),\n354: \t\tzap.String(\"initial-cluster-token\", sc.InitialClusterToken),\n355: \t\tzap.Int64(\"quota-backend-bytes\", quota),\n356: \t\tzap.Uint(\"max-request-bytes\", sc.MaxRequestBytes),\n357: \t\tzap.Uint32(\"max-concurrent-streams\", sc.MaxConcurrentStreams),\n358: \n359: \t\tzap.Bool(\"pre-vote\", sc.PreVote),\n360: \t\tzap.String(ServerFeatureGateFlagName, sc.ServerFeatureGate.String()),\n361: \t\tzap.Bool(\"initial-corrupt-check\", sc.InitialCorruptCheck),\n362: \t\tzap.String(\"corrupt-check-time-interval\", sc.CorruptCheckTime.String()),\n363: \t\tzap.Duration(\"compact-check-time-interval\", sc.CompactHashCheckTime),\n364: \t\tzap.String(\"auto-compaction-mode\", sc.AutoCompactionMode),\n365: \t\tzap.Duration(\"auto-compaction-retention\", sc.AutoCompactionRetention),\n366: \t\tzap.String(\"auto-compaction-interval\", sc.AutoCompactionRetention.String()),\n367: \n368: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-token\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Token),\n369: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-endpoints\", strings.Join(sc.DiscoveryCfg.Endpoints, \",\")),\n370: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-dial-timeout\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.DialTimeout.String()),\n371: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-request-timeout\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.RequestTimeout.String()),\n372: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-keepalive-time\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.KeepAliveTime.String()),\n373: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-keepalive-timeout\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.KeepAliveTimeout.String()),\n374: \t\tzap.Bool(\"discovery-insecure-transport\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.InsecureTransport),\n375: \t\tzap.Bool(\"discovery-insecure-skip-tls-verify\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.InsecureSkipVerify),\n376: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-cert\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.Cert),\n377: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-key\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.Key),\n378: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-cacert\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Secure.Cacert),\n379: \t\tzap.String(\"discovery-user\", sc.DiscoveryCfg.Auth.Username),\n380: \n381: \t\tzap.String(\"downgrade-check-interval\", sc.DowngradeCheckTime.String()),\n382: \t\tzap.Int(\"max-learners\", sc.MaxLearners),\n383: \n384: \t\tzap.String(\"v2-deprecation\", string(ec.V2Deprecation)),\n385: \t)\n386: }\n387: \n388: // Config returns the current configuration.\n389: func (e *Etcd) Config() Config {\n390: \treturn e.cfg\n391: }\n392: \n393: // Close gracefully shuts down all servers/listeners.\n394: // Client requests will be terminated with request timeout.\n395: // After timeout, enforce remaning requests be closed immediately.\n396: //\n397: // The rough workflow to shut down etcd:\n398: //  1. close the `stopc` channel, so that all error handlers (child\n399: //     goroutines) won't send back any errors anymore;\n400: //  2. stop the http and grpc servers gracefully, within request timeout;\n401: //  3. close all client and metrics listeners, so that etcd server\n402: //     stops receiving any new connection;\n403: //  4. call the cancel function to close the gateway context, so that\n404: //     all gateway connections are closed.\n405: //  5. stop etcd server gracefully, and ensure the main raft loop\n406: //     goroutine is stopped;\n407: //  6. stop all peer listeners, so that it stops receiving peer connections\n408: //     and messages (wait up to 1-second);\n409: //  7. wait for all child goroutines (i.e. client handlers, peer handlers\n410: //     and metrics handlers) to exit;\n411: //  8. close the `errc` channel to release the resource. Note that it's only\n412: //     safe to close the `errc` after step 7 above is done, otherwise the\n413: //     child goroutines may send errors back to already closed `errc` channel.\n414: func (e *Etcd) Close() {\n415: \tfields := []zap.Field{\n416: \t\tzap.String(\"name\", e.cfg.Name),\n417: \t\tzap.String(\"data-dir\", e.cfg.Dir),\n418: \t\tzap.Strings(\"advertise-peer-urls\", e.cfg.getAdvertisePeerURLs()),\n419: \t\tzap.Strings(\"advertise-client-urls\", e.cfg.getAdvertiseClientURLs()),\n420: \t}\n421: \tlg := e.GetLogger()\n422: \tlg.Info(\"closing etcd server\", fields...)\n423: \tdefer func() {\n424: \t\tlg.Info(\"closed etcd server\", fields...)\n425: \t\tverify.MustVerifyIfEnabled(verify.Config{\n426: \t\t\tLogger:     lg,\n427: \t\t\tDataDir:    e.cfg.Dir,\n428: \t\t\tExactIndex: false,\n429: \t\t})\n430: \t\tlg.Sync()\n431: \t}()\n432: \n433: \te.closeOnce.Do(func() {\n434: \t\tclose(e.stopc)\n435: \t})\n436: \n437: \t// close client requests with request timeout\n438: \ttimeout := 2 * time.Second\n439: \tif e.Server != nil {\n440: \t\ttimeout = e.Server.Cfg.ReqTimeout()\n441: \t}\n442: \tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\n443: \t\tfor ss := range sctx.serversC {\n444: \t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)\n445: \t\t\tstopServers(ctx, ss)\n446: \t\t\tcancel()\n447: \t\t}\n448: \t}\n449: \n450: \tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\n451: \t\tsctx.cancel()\n452: \t}\n453: \n454: \tfor i := range e.Clients {\n455: \t\tif e.Clients[i] != nil {\n456: \t\t\te.Clients[i].Close()\n457: \t\t}\n458: \t}\n459: \n460: \tfor i := range e.metricsListeners {\n461: \t\te.metricsListeners[i].Close()\n462: \t}\n463: \n464: \t// shutdown tracing exporter\n465: \tif e.tracingExporterShutdown != nil {\n466: \t\te.tracingExporterShutdown()\n467: \t}\n468: \n469: \t// close rafthttp transports\n470: \tif e.Server != nil {\n471: \t\te.Server.Stop()\n472: \t}\n473: \n474: \t// close all idle connections in peer handler (wait up to 1-second)\n475: \tfor i := range e.Peers {\n476: \t\tif e.Peers[i] != nil && e.Peers[i].close != nil {\n477: \t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second)\n478: \t\t\te.Peers[i].close(ctx)\n479: \t\t\tcancel()\n480: \t\t}\n481: \t}\n482: \tif e.errc != nil {\n483: \t\te.wg.Wait()\n484: \t\tclose(e.errc)\n485: \t}\n486: }\n487: \n488: func stopServers(ctx context.Context, ss *servers) {\n489: \t// first, close the http.Server\n490: \tif ss.http != nil {\n491: \t\tss.http.Shutdown(ctx)\n492: \t}\n493: \tif ss.grpc == nil {\n494: \t\treturn\n495: \t}\n496: \t// do not grpc.Server.GracefulStop when grpc runs under http server\n497: \t// See https://github.com/grpc/grpc-go/issues/1384#issuecomment-317124531\n498: \t// and https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/8916\n499: \tif ss.secure && ss.http != nil {\n500: \t\tss.grpc.Stop()\n501: \t\treturn\n502: \t}\n503: \n504: \tch := make(chan struct{})\n505: \tgo func() {\n506: \t\tdefer close(ch)\n507: \t\t// close listeners to stop accepting new connections,\n508: \t\t// will block on any existing transports\n509: \t\tss.grpc.GracefulStop()\n510: \t}()\n511: \n512: \t// wait until all pending RPCs are finished\n513: \tselect {\n514: \tcase <-ch:\n515: \tcase <-ctx.Done():\n516: \t\t// took too long, manually close open transports\n517: \t\t// e.g. watch streams\n518: \t\tss.grpc.Stop()\n519: \n520: \t\t// concurrent GracefulStop should be interrupted\n521: \t\t<-ch\n522: \t}\n523: }\n524: \n525: // Err - return channel used to report errors during etcd run/shutdown.\n526: // Since etcd 3.5 the channel is being closed when the etcd is over.\n527: func (e *Etcd) Err() <-chan error {\n528: \treturn e.errc\n529: }\n530: \n531: func configurePeerListeners(cfg *Config) (peers []*peerListener, err error) {\n532: \tif err = updateCipherSuites(&cfg.PeerTLSInfo, cfg.CipherSuites); err != nil {\n533: \t\treturn nil, err\n534: \t}\n535: \tif err = cfg.PeerSelfCert(); err != nil {\n536: \t\tcfg.logger.Fatal(\"failed to get peer self-signed certs\", zap.Error(err))\n537: \t}\n538: \tupdateMinMaxVersions(&cfg.PeerTLSInfo, cfg.TlsMinVersion, cfg.TlsMaxVersion)\n539: \tif !cfg.PeerTLSInfo.Empty() {\n540: \t\tcfg.logger.Info(\n541: \t\t\t\"starting with peer TLS\",\n542: \t\t\tzap.String(\"tls-info\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%+v\", cfg.PeerTLSInfo)),\n543: \t\t\tzap.Strings(\"cipher-suites\", cfg.CipherSuites),\n544: \t\t)\n545: \t}\n546: \n547: \tpeers = make([]*peerListener, len(cfg.ListenPeerUrls))\n548: \tdefer func() {\n549: \t\tif err == nil {\n550: \t\t\treturn\n551: \t\t}\n552: \t\tfor i := range peers {\n553: \t\t\tif peers[i] != nil && peers[i].close != nil {\n554: \t\t\t\tcfg.logger.Warn(\n555: \t\t\t\t\t\"closing peer listener\",\n556: \t\t\t\t\tzap.String(\"address\", cfg.ListenPeerUrls[i].String()),\n557: \t\t\t\t\tzap.Error(err),\n558: \t\t\t\t)\n559: \t\t\t\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), time.Second)\n560: \t\t\t\tpeers[i].close(ctx)\n561: \t\t\t\tcancel()\n562: \t\t\t}\n563: \t\t}\n564: \t}()\n565: \n566: \tfor i, u := range cfg.ListenPeerUrls {\n567: \t\tif u.Scheme == \"http\" {\n568: \t\t\tif !cfg.PeerTLSInfo.Empty() {\n569: \t\t\t\tcfg.logger.Warn(\"scheme is HTTP while key and cert files are present; ignoring key and cert files\", zap.String(\"peer-url\", u.String()))\n570: \t\t\t}\n571: \t\t\tif cfg.PeerTLSInfo.ClientCertAuth {\n572: \t\t\t\tcfg.logger.Warn(\"scheme is HTTP while --peer-client-cert-auth is enabled; ignoring client cert auth for this URL\", zap.String(\"peer-url\", u.String()))\n573: \t\t\t}\n574: \t\t}\n575: \t\tpeers[i] = &peerListener{close: func(context.Context) error { return nil }}\n576: \t\tpeers[i].Listener, err = transport.NewListenerWithOpts(u.Host, u.Scheme,\n577: \t\t\ttransport.WithTLSInfo(&cfg.PeerTLSInfo),\n578: \t\t\ttransport.WithSocketOpts(&cfg.SocketOpts),\n579: \t\t\ttransport.WithTimeout(rafthttp.ConnReadTimeout, rafthttp.ConnWriteTimeout),\n580: \t\t)\n581: \t\tif err != nil {\n582: \t\t\tcfg.logger.Error(\"creating peer listener failed\", zap.Error(err))\n583: \t\t\treturn nil, err\n584: \t\t}\n585: \t\t// once serve, overwrite with 'http.Server.Shutdown'\n586: \t\tpeers[i].close = func(context.Context) error {\n587: \t\t\treturn peers[i].Listener.Close()\n588: \t\t}\n589: \t}\n590: \treturn peers, nil\n591: }\n592: \n593: // configure peer handlers after rafthttp.Transport started\n594: func (e *Etcd) servePeers() {\n595: \tph := etcdhttp.NewPeerHandler(e.GetLogger(), e.Server)\n596: \n597: \tfor _, p := range e.Peers {\n598: \t\tu := p.Listener.Addr().String()\n599: \t\tm := cmux.New(p.Listener)\n600: \t\tsrv := &http.Server{\n601: \t\t\tHandler:     ph,\n602: \t\t\tReadTimeout: 5 * time.Minute,\n603: \t\t\tErrorLog:    defaultLog.New(io.Discard, \"\", 0), // do not log user error\n604: \t\t}\n605: \t\tgo srv.Serve(m.Match(cmux.Any()))\n606: \t\tp.serve = func() error {\n607: \t\t\te.cfg.logger.Info(\n608: \t\t\t\t\"cmux::serve\",\n609: \t\t\t\tzap.String(\"address\", u),\n610: \t\t\t)\n611: \t\t\treturn m.Serve()\n612: \t\t}\n613: \t\tp.close = func(ctx context.Context) error {\n614: \t\t\t// gracefully shutdown http.Server\n615: \t\t\t// close open listeners, idle connections\n616: \t\t\t// until context cancel or time-out\n617: \t\t\te.cfg.logger.Info(\n618: \t\t\t\t\"stopping serving peer traffic\",\n619: \t\t\t\tzap.String(\"address\", u),\n620: \t\t\t)\n621: \t\t\tsrv.Shutdown(ctx)\n622: \t\t\te.cfg.logger.Info(\n623: \t\t\t\t\"stopped serving peer traffic\",\n624: \t\t\t\tzap.String(\"address\", u),\n625: \t\t\t)\n626: \t\t\tm.Close()\n627: \t\t\treturn nil\n628: \t\t}\n629: \t}\n630: \n631: \t// start peer servers in a goroutine\n632: \tfor _, pl := range e.Peers {\n633: \t\tl := pl\n634: \t\te.startHandler(func() error {\n635: \t\t\tu := l.Addr().String()\n636: \t\t\te.cfg.logger.Info(\n637: \t\t\t\t\"serving peer traffic\",\n638: \t\t\t\tzap.String(\"address\", u),\n639: \t\t\t)\n640: \t\t\treturn l.serve()\n641: \t\t})\n642: \t}\n643: }\n644: \n645: func configureClientListeners(cfg *Config) (sctxs map[string]*serveCtx, err error) {\n646: \tif err = updateCipherSuites(&cfg.ClientTLSInfo, cfg.CipherSuites); err != nil {\n647: \t\treturn nil, err\n648: \t}\n649: \tif err = cfg.ClientSelfCert(); err != nil {\n650: \t\tcfg.logger.Fatal(\"failed to get client self-signed certs\", zap.Error(err))\n651: \t}\n652: \tupdateMinMaxVersions(&cfg.ClientTLSInfo, cfg.TlsMinVersion, cfg.TlsMaxVersion)\n653: \tif cfg.EnablePprof {\n654: \t\tcfg.logger.Info(\"pprof is enabled\", zap.String(\"path\", debugutil.HTTPPrefixPProf))\n655: \t}\n656: \n657: \tsctxs = make(map[string]*serveCtx)\n658: \tfor _, u := range append(cfg.ListenClientUrls, cfg.ListenClientHttpUrls...) {\n659: \t\tif u.Scheme == \"http\" || u.Scheme == \"unix\" {\n660: \t\t\tif !cfg.ClientTLSInfo.Empty() {\n661: \t\t\t\tcfg.logger.Warn(\"scheme is http or unix while key and cert files are present; ignoring key and cert files\", zap.String(\"client-url\", u.String()))\n662: \t\t\t}\n663: \t\t\tif cfg.ClientTLSInfo.ClientCertAuth {\n664: \t\t\t\tcfg.logger.Warn(\"scheme is http or unix while --client-cert-auth is enabled; ignoring client cert auth for this URL\", zap.String(\"client-url\", u.String()))\n665: \t\t\t}\n666: \t\t}\n667: \t\tif (u.Scheme == \"https\" || u.Scheme == \"unixs\") && cfg.ClientTLSInfo.Empty() {\n668: \t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"TLS key/cert (--cert-file, --key-file) must be provided for client url %s with HTTPS scheme\", u.String())\n669: \t\t}\n670: \t}\n671: \n672: \tfor _, u := range cfg.ListenClientUrls {\n673: \t\taddr, secure, network := resolveURL(u)\n674: \t\tsctx := sctxs[addr]\n675: \t\tif sctx == nil {\n676: \t\t\tsctx = newServeCtx(cfg.logger)\n677: \t\t\tsctxs[addr] = sctx\n678: \t\t}\n679: \t\tsctx.secure = sctx.secure || secure\n680: \t\tsctx.insecure = sctx.insecure || !secure\n681: \t\tsctx.scheme = u.Scheme\n682: \t\tsctx.addr = addr\n683: \t\tsctx.network = network\n684: \t}\n685: \tfor _, u := range cfg.ListenClientHttpUrls {\n686: \t\taddr, secure, network := resolveURL(u)\n687: \n688: \t\tsctx := sctxs[addr]\n689: \t\tif sctx == nil {\n690: \t\t\tsctx = newServeCtx(cfg.logger)\n691: \t\t\tsctxs[addr] = sctx\n692: \t\t} else if !sctx.httpOnly {\n693: \t\t\treturn nil, fmt.Errorf(\"cannot bind both --listen-client-urls and --listen-client-http-urls on the same url %s\", u.String())\n694: \t\t}\n695: \t\tsctx.secure = sctx.secure || secure\n696: \t\tsctx.insecure = sctx.insecure || !secure\n697: \t\tsctx.scheme = u.Scheme\n698: \t\tsctx.addr = addr\n699: \t\tsctx.network = network\n700: \t\tsctx.httpOnly = true\n701: \t}\n702: \n703: \tfor _, sctx := range sctxs {\n704: \t\tif sctx.l, err = transport.NewListenerWithOpts(sctx.addr, sctx.scheme,\n705: \t\t\ttransport.WithSocketOpts(&cfg.SocketOpts),\n706: \t\t\ttransport.WithSkipTLSInfoCheck(true),\n707: \t\t); err != nil {\n708: \t\t\treturn nil, err\n709: \t\t}\n710: \t\t// net.Listener will rewrite ipv4 0.0.0.0 to ipv6 [::], breaking\n711: \t\t// hosts that disable ipv6. So, use the address given by the user.\n712: \n713: \t\tif fdLimit, fderr := runtimeutil.FDLimit(); fderr == nil {\n714: \t\t\tif fdLimit <= reservedInternalFDNum {\n715: \t\t\t\tcfg.logger.Fatal(\n716: \t\t\t\t\t\"file descriptor limit of etcd process is too low; please set higher\",\n717: \t\t\t\t\tzap.Uint64(\"limit\", fdLimit),\n718: \t\t\t\t\tzap.Int(\"recommended-limit\", reservedInternalFDNum),\n719: \t\t\t\t)\n720: \t\t\t}\n721: \t\t\tsctx.l = transport.LimitListener(sctx.l, int(fdLimit-reservedInternalFDNum))\n722: \t\t}\n723: \n724: \t\tdefer func(sctx *serveCtx) {\n725: \t\t\tif err == nil || sctx.l == nil {\n726: \t\t\t\treturn\n727: \t\t\t}\n728: \t\t\tsctx.l.Close()\n729: \t\t\tcfg.logger.Warn(\n730: \t\t\t\t\"closing peer listener\",\n731: \t\t\t\tzap.String(\"address\", sctx.addr),\n732: \t\t\t\tzap.Error(err),\n733: \t\t\t)\n734: \t\t}(sctx)\n735: \t\tfor k := range cfg.UserHandlers {\n736: \t\t\tsctx.userHandlers[k] = cfg.UserHandlers[k]\n737: \t\t}\n738: \t\tsctx.serviceRegister = cfg.ServiceRegister\n739: \t\tif cfg.EnablePprof || cfg.LogLevel == \"debug\" {\n740: \t\t\tsctx.registerPprof()\n741: \t\t}\n742: \t\tif cfg.LogLevel == \"debug\" {\n743: \t\t\tsctx.registerTrace()\n744: \t\t}\n745: \t}\n746: \treturn sctxs, nil\n747: }\n748: \n749: func resolveURL(u url.URL) (addr string, secure bool, network string) {\n750: \taddr = u.Host\n751: \tnetwork = \"tcp\"\n752: \tif u.Scheme == \"unix\" || u.Scheme == \"unixs\" {\n753: \t\taddr = u.Host + u.Path\n754: \t\tnetwork = \"unix\"\n755: \t}\n756: \tsecure = u.Scheme == \"https\" || u.Scheme == \"unixs\"\n757: \treturn addr, secure, network\n758: }\n759: \n760: func (e *Etcd) serveClients() {\n761: \tif !e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo.Empty() {\n762: \t\te.cfg.logger.Info(\n763: \t\t\t\"starting with client TLS\",\n764: \t\t\tzap.String(\"tls-info\", fmt.Sprintf(\"%+v\", e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo)),\n765: \t\t\tzap.Strings(\"cipher-suites\", e.cfg.CipherSuites),\n766: \t\t)\n767: \t}\n768: \n769: \t// Start a client server goroutine for each listen address\n770: \tmux := http.NewServeMux()\n771: \tetcdhttp.HandleDebug(mux)\n772: \tetcdhttp.HandleVersion(mux, e.Server)\n773: \tetcdhttp.HandleMetrics(mux)\n774: \tetcdhttp.HandleHealth(e.cfg.logger, mux, e.Server)\n775: \n776: \tvar gopts []grpc.ServerOption\n777: \tif e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveMinTime > time.Duration(0) {\n778: \t\tgopts = append(gopts, grpc.KeepaliveEnforcementPolicy(keepalive.EnforcementPolicy{\n779: \t\t\tMinTime:             e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveMinTime,\n780: \t\t\tPermitWithoutStream: false,\n781: \t\t}))\n782: \t}\n783: \tif e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveInterval > time.Duration(0) &&\n784: \t\te.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveTimeout > time.Duration(0) {\n785: \t\tgopts = append(gopts, grpc.KeepaliveParams(keepalive.ServerParameters{\n786: \t\t\tTime:    e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveInterval,\n787: \t\t\tTimeout: e.cfg.GRPCKeepAliveTimeout,\n788: \t\t}))\n789: \t}\n790: \tgopts = append(gopts, e.cfg.GRPCAdditionalServerOptions...)\n791: \n792: \tsplitHTTP := false\n793: \tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\n794: \t\tif sctx.httpOnly {\n795: \t\t\tsplitHTTP = true\n796: \t\t}\n797: \t}\n798: \n799: \t// start client servers in each goroutine\n800: \tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\n801: \t\ts := sctx\n802: \t\te.startHandler(func() error {\n803: \t\t\treturn s.serve(e.Server, &e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo, mux, e.errHandler, e.grpcGatewayDial(splitHTTP), splitHTTP, gopts...)\n804: \t\t})\n805: \t}\n806: }\n807: \n808: func (e *Etcd) grpcGatewayDial(splitHTTP bool) (grpcDial func(ctx context.Context) (*grpc.ClientConn, error)) {\n809: \tif !e.cfg.EnableGRPCGateway {\n810: \t\treturn nil\n811: \t}\n812: \tsctx := e.pickGRPCGatewayServeContext(splitHTTP)\n813: \taddr := sctx.addr\n814: \tif network := sctx.network; network == \"unix\" {\n815: \t\t// explicitly define unix network for gRPC socket support\n816: \t\taddr = fmt.Sprintf(\"%s:%s\", network, addr)\n817: \t}\n818: \topts := []grpc.DialOption{grpc.WithDefaultCallOptions(grpc.MaxCallRecvMsgSize(math.MaxInt32))}\n819: \tif sctx.secure {\n820: \t\ttlscfg, tlsErr := e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo.ServerConfig()\n821: \t\tif tlsErr != nil {\n822: \t\t\treturn func(ctx context.Context) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {\n823: \t\t\t\treturn nil, tlsErr\n824: \t\t\t}\n825: \t\t}\n826: \t\tdtls := tlscfg.Clone()\n827: \t\t// trust local server\n828: \t\tdtls.InsecureSkipVerify = true\n829: \t\topts = append(opts, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(credentials.NewTransportCredential(dtls)))\n830: \t} else {\n831: \t\topts = append(opts, grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()))\n832: \t}\n833: \n834: \treturn func(ctx context.Context) (*grpc.ClientConn, error) {\n835: \t\tconn, err := grpc.DialContext(ctx, addr, opts...) //nolint:staticcheck // TODO: remove for a supported version\n836: \t\tif err != nil {\n837: \t\t\tsctx.lg.Error(\"grpc gateway failed to dial\", zap.String(\"addr\", addr), zap.Error(err))\n838: \t\t\treturn nil, err\n839: \t\t}\n840: \t\treturn conn, err\n841: \t}\n842: }\n843: \n844: func (e *Etcd) pickGRPCGatewayServeContext(splitHTTP bool) *serveCtx {\n845: \tfor _, sctx := range e.sctxs {\n846: \t\tif !splitHTTP || !sctx.httpOnly {\n847: \t\t\treturn sctx\n848: \t\t}\n849: \t}\n850: \tpanic(\"Expect at least one context able to serve grpc\")\n851: }\n852: \n853: var ErrMissingClientTLSInfoForMetricsURL = errors.New(\"client TLS key/cert (--cert-file, --key-file) must be provided for metrics secure url\")\n854: \n855: func (e *Etcd) createMetricsListener(murl url.URL) (net.Listener, error) {\n856: \ttlsInfo := &e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo\n857: \tswitch murl.Scheme {\n858: \tcase \"http\":\n859: \t\ttlsInfo = nil\n860: \tcase \"https\", \"unixs\":\n861: \t\tif e.cfg.ClientTLSInfo.Empty() {\n862: \t\t\treturn nil, ErrMissingClientTLSInfoForMetricsURL\n863: \t\t}\n864: \t}\n865: \treturn transport.NewListenerWithOpts(murl.Host, murl.Scheme,\n866: \t\ttransport.WithTLSInfo(tlsInfo),\n867: \t\ttransport.WithSocketOpts(&e.cfg.SocketOpts),\n868: \t)\n869: }\n870: \n871: func (e *Etcd) serveMetrics() (err error) {\n872: \tif len(e.cfg.ListenMetricsUrls) > 0 {\n873: \t\tmetricsMux := http.NewServeMux()\n874: \t\tetcdhttp.HandleMetrics(metricsMux)\n875: \t\tetcdhttp.HandleHealth(e.cfg.logger, metricsMux, e.Server)\n876: \n877: \t\tfor _, murl := range e.cfg.ListenMetricsUrls {\n878: \t\t\tu := murl\n879: \t\t\tml, err := e.createMetricsListener(murl)\n880: \t\t\tif err != nil {\n881: \t\t\t\treturn err\n882: \t\t\t}\n883: \t\t\te.metricsListeners = append(e.metricsListeners, ml)\n884: \n885: \t\t\te.startHandler(func() error {\n886: \t\t\t\te.cfg.logger.Info(\n887: \t\t\t\t\t\"serving metrics\",\n888: \t\t\t\t\tzap.String(\"address\", u.String()),\n889: \t\t\t\t)\n890: \t\t\t\treturn http.Serve(ml, metricsMux)\n891: \t\t\t})\n892: \t\t}\n893: \t}\n894: \treturn nil\n895: }\n896: \n897: func (e *Etcd) startHandler(handler func() error) {\n898: \t// start each handler in a separate goroutine\n899: \te.wg.Add(1)\n900: \tgo func() {\n901: \t\tdefer e.wg.Done()\n902: \t\te.errHandler(handler())\n903: \t}()\n904: }\n905: \n906: func (e *Etcd) errHandler(err error) {\n907: \tif err != nil {\n908: \t\te.GetLogger().Error(\"setting up serving from embedded etcd failed.\", zap.Error(err))\n909: \t}\n910: \tselect {\n911: \tcase <-e.stopc:\n912: \t\treturn\n913: \tdefault:\n914: \t}\n915: \tselect {\n916: \tcase <-e.stopc:\n917: \tcase e.errc <- err:\n918: \t}\n919: }\n920: \n921: // GetLogger returns the logger.\n922: func (e *Etcd) GetLogger() *zap.Logger {\n923: \te.cfg.loggerMu.RLock()\n924: \tl := e.cfg.logger\n925: \te.cfg.loggerMu.RUnlock()\n926: \treturn l\n927: }\n928: \n929: func parseCompactionRetention(mode, retention string) (ret time.Duration, err error) {\n930: \th, err := strconv.Atoi(retention)\n931: \tif err == nil && h >= 0 {\n932: \t\tswitch mode {\n933: \t\tcase CompactorModeRevision:\n934: \t\t\tret = time.Duration(int64(h))\n935: \t\tcase CompactorModePeriodic:\n936: \t\t\tret = time.Duration(int64(h)) * time.Hour\n937: \t\tcase \"\":\n938: \t\t\treturn 0, errors.New(\"--auto-compaction-mode is undefined\")\n939: \t\t}\n940: \t} else {\n941: \t\t// periodic compaction\n942: \t\tret, err = time.ParseDuration(retention)\n943: \t\tif err != nil {\n944: \t\t\treturn 0, fmt.Errorf(\"error parsing CompactionRetention: %w\", err)\n945: \t\t}\n946: \t}\n947: \treturn ret, nil\n948: }\n949: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/etcd--d89978e8@d89978e8e32196a3d7410690ebed1d94baf32dbe/-/blob/server/embed/etcd.go"
  }
}

writing, software\\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \\\"AS IS\\\" BASIS,\\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\\n14: limitations under the License.\\n15: */\\n16: \\n17: package grpc\\n18: \\n19: import (\\n20: \\t\\\"context\\\"\\n21: \\t\\\"fmt\\\"\\n22: \\t\\\"net\\\"\\n23: \\t\\\"time\\\"\\n24: \\n25: \\t\\\"google.golang.org/grpc\\\"\\n26: \\t\\\"google.golang.org/grpc/codes\\\"\\n27: \\t\\\"google.golang.org/grpc/credentials/insecure\\\"\\n28: \\tgrpchealth \\\"google.golang.org/grpc/health/grpc_health_v1\\\"\\n29: \\t\\\"google.golang.org/grpc/metadata\\\"\\n30: \\t\\\"google.golang.org/grpc/status\\\"\\n31: \\t\\\"k8s.io/component-base/version\\\"\\n32: \\t\\\"k8s.io/klog/v2\\\"\\n33: \\t\\\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/probe\\\"\\n34: )\\n35: \\n36: // Prober is an interface that defines the Probe function for doing GRPC readiness/liveness/startup checks.\\n37: type Prober interface {\\n38: \\tProbe(host, service string, port int, timeout time.Duration) (probe.Result, string, error)\\n39: }\\n40: \\n41: type grpcProber struct {\\n42: }\\n43: \\n44: // New Prober for execute grpc probe\\n45: func New() Prober {\\n46: \\treturn grpcProber{}\\n47: }\\n48: \\n49: // Probe executes a grpc call to check the liveness/readiness/startup of container.\\n50: // Returns the Result status, command output, and errors if any.\\n51: // Any failure is considered as a probe failure to mimic grpc_health_probe tool behavior.\\n52: // err is always nil\\n53: func (p grpcProber) Probe(host, service string, port int, timeout time.Duration) (probe.Result, string, error) {\\n54: \\tv := version.Get()\\n55: \\n56: \\topts := []grpc.DialOption{\\n57: \\t\\tgrpc.WithUserAgent(fmt.Sprintf(\\\"kube-probe/%s.%s\\\", v.Major, v.Minor)),\\n58: \\t\\tgrpc.WithBlock(),\\n59: \\t\\tgrpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()), //credentials are currently not supported\\n60: \\t\\tgrpc.WithContextDialer(func(ctx context.Context, addr string) (net.Conn, error) {\\n61: \\t\\t\\treturn probe.ProbeDialer().DialContext(ctx, \\\"tcp\\\", addr)\\n62: \\t\\t}),\\n63: \\t}\\n64: \\n65: \\tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)\\n66: \\n67: \\tdefer cancel()\\n68: \\n69: \\taddr := net.JoinHostPort(host, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"%d\\\", port))\\n70: \\tconn, err := grpc.DialContext(ctx, addr, opts...)\\n71: \\n72: \\tif err != nil {\\n73: \\t\\tif err == context.DeadlineExceeded {\\n74: \\t\\t\\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \\\"failed to connect grpc service due to timeout\\\", \\\"addr\\\", addr, \\\"service\\\", service, \\\"timeout\\\", timeout)\\n75: \\t\\t\\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"timeout: failed to connect service %q within %v: %+v\\\", addr, timeout, err), nil\\n76: \\t\\t} else {\\n77: \\t\\t\\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \\\"failed to connect grpc service\\\", \\\"service\\\", addr)\\n78: \\t\\t\\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"error: failed to connect service at %q: %+v\\\", addr, err), nil\\n79: \\t\\t}\\n80: \\t}\\n81: \\n82: \\tdefer func() {\\n83: \\t\\t_ = conn.Close()\\n84: \\t}()\\n85: \\n86: \\tclient := grpchealth.NewHealthClient(conn)\\n87: \\n88: \\tresp, err := client.Check(metadata.NewOutgoingContext(ctx, make(metadata.MD)), &grpchealth.HealthCheckRequest{\\n89: \\t\\tService: service,\\n90: \\t})\\n91: \\n92: \\tif err != nil {\\n93: \\t\\tstat, ok := status.FromError(err)\\n94: \\t\\tif ok {\\n95: \\t\\t\\tswitch stat.Code() {\\n96: \\t\\t\\tcase codes.Unimplemented:\\n97: \\t\\t\\t\\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \\\"server does not implement the grpc health protocol (grpc.health.v1.Health)\\\", \\\"addr\\\", addr, \\\"service\\\", service)\\n98: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"error: this server does not implement the grpc health protocol (grpc.health.v1.Health): %s\\\", stat.Message()), nil\\n99: \\t\\t\\tcase codes.DeadlineExceeded:\\n100: \\t\\t\\t\\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \\\"rpc request not finished within timeout\\\", \\\"addr\\\", addr, \\\"service\\\", service, \\\"timeout\\\", timeout)\\n101: \\t\\t\\t\\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"timeout: health rpc did not complete within %v\\\", timeout), nil\\n102: \\t\\t\\tdefault:\\n103: \\t\\t\\t\\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \\\"rpc probe failed\\\")\\n104: \\t\\t\\t}\\n105: \\t\\t} else {\\n106: \\t\\t\\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \\\"health rpc probe failed\\\")\\n107: \\t\\t}\\n108: \\n109: \\t\\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"error: health rpc probe failed: %+v\\\", err), nil\\n110: \\t}\\n111: \\n112: \\tif resp.GetStatus() != grpchealth.HealthCheckResponse_SERVING {\\n113: \\t\\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"service unhealthy (responded with %q)\\\", resp.GetStatus().String()), nil\\n114: \\t}\\n115: \\n116: \\treturn probe.Success, fmt.Sprintf(\\\"service healthy\\\"), nil\\n117: }\\n118: \",\"url\":\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/kubernetes--8c9c67c0@8c9c67c000104450cfc5a5f48053a9a84b73cf93/-/blob/pkg/probe/grpc/grpc.go\"}",

    "content": "1: /*\n2: Copyright 2021 The Kubernetes Authors.\n3: \n4: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the \"License\");\n5: you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.\n6: You may obtain a copy of the License at\n7: \n8:     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0\n9: \n10: Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software\n11: distributed under the License is distributed on an \"AS IS\" BASIS,\n12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.\n13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and\n14: limitations under the License.\n15: */\n16: \n17: package grpc\n18: \n19: import (\n20: \t\"context\"\n21: \t\"fmt\"\n22: \t\"net\"\n23: \t\"time\"\n24: \n25: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc\"\n26: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc/codes\"\n27: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc/credentials/insecure\"\n28: \tgrpchealth \"google.golang.org/grpc/health/grpc_health_v1\"\n29: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc/metadata\"\n30: \t\"google.golang.org/grpc/status\"\n31: \t\"k8s.io/component-base/version\"\n32: \t\"k8s.io/klog/v2\"\n33: \t\"k8s.io/kubernetes/pkg/probe\"\n34: )\n35: \n36: // Prober is an interface that defines the Probe function for doing GRPC readiness/liveness/startup checks.\n37: type Prober interface {\n38: \tProbe(host, service string, port int, timeout time.Duration) (probe.Result, string, error)\n39: }\n40: \n41: type grpcProber struct {\n42: }\n43: \n44: // New Prober for execute grpc probe\n45: func New() Prober {\n46: \treturn grpcProber{}\n47: }\n48: \n49: // Probe executes a grpc call to check the liveness/readiness/startup of container.\n50: // Returns the Result status, command output, and errors if any.\n51: // Any failure is considered as a probe failure to mimic grpc_health_probe tool behavior.\n52: // err is always nil\n53: func (p grpcProber) Probe(host, service string, port int, timeout time.Duration) (probe.Result, string, error) {\n54: \tv := version.Get()\n55: \n56: \topts := []grpc.DialOption{\n57: \t\tgrpc.WithUserAgent(fmt.Sprintf(\"kube-probe/%s.%s\", v.Major, v.Minor)),\n58: \t\tgrpc.WithBlock(),\n59: \t\tgrpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()), //credentials are currently not supported\n60: \t\tgrpc.WithContextDialer(func(ctx context.Context, addr string) (net.Conn, error) {\n61: \t\t\treturn probe.ProbeDialer().DialContext(ctx, \"tcp\", addr)\n62: \t\t}),\n63: \t}\n64: \n65: \tctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), timeout)\n66: \n67: \tdefer cancel()\n68: \n69: \taddr := net.JoinHostPort(host, fmt.Sprintf(\"%d\", port))\n70: \tconn, err := grpc.DialContext(ctx, addr, opts...)\n71: \n72: \tif err != nil {\n73: \t\tif err == context.DeadlineExceeded {\n74: \t\t\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \"failed to connect grpc service due to timeout\", \"addr\", addr, \"service\", service, \"timeout\", timeout)\n75: \t\t\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\"timeout: failed to connect service %q within %v: %+v\", addr, timeout, err), nil\n76: \t\t} else {\n77: \t\t\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \"failed to connect grpc service\", \"service\", addr)\n78: \t\t\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\"error: failed to connect service at %q: %+v\", addr, err), nil\n79: \t\t}\n80: \t}\n81: \n82: \tdefer func() {\n83: \t\t_ = conn.Close()\n84: \t}()\n85: \n86: \tclient := grpchealth.NewHealthClient(conn)\n87: \n88: \tresp, err := client.Check(metadata.NewOutgoingContext(ctx, make(metadata.MD)), &grpchealth.HealthCheckRequest{\n89: \t\tService: service,\n90: \t})\n91: \n92: \tif err != nil {\n93: \t\tstat, ok := status.FromError(err)\n94: \t\tif ok {\n95: \t\t\tswitch stat.Code() {\n96: \t\t\tcase codes.Unimplemented:\n97: \t\t\t\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \"server does not implement the grpc health protocol (grpc.health.v1.Health)\", \"addr\", addr, \"service\", service)\n98: \t\t\t\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\"error: this server does not implement the grpc health protocol (grpc.health.v1.Health): %s\", stat.Message()), nil\n99: \t\t\tcase codes.DeadlineExceeded:\n100: \t\t\t\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \"rpc request not finished within timeout\", \"addr\", addr, \"service\", service, \"timeout\", timeout)\n101: \t\t\t\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\"timeout: health rpc did not complete within %v\", timeout), nil\n102: \t\t\tdefault:\n103: \t\t\t\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \"rpc probe failed\")\n104: \t\t\t}\n105: \t\t} else {\n106: \t\t\tklog.V(4).ErrorS(err, \"health rpc probe failed\")\n107: \t\t}\n108: \n109: \t\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\"error: health rpc probe failed: %+v\", err), nil\n110: \t}\n111: \n112: \tif resp.GetStatus() != grpchealth.HealthCheckResponse_SERVING {\n113: \t\treturn probe.Failure, fmt.Sprintf(\"service unhealthy (responded with %q)\", resp.GetStatus().String()), nil\n114: \t}\n115: \n116: \treturn probe.Success, fmt.Sprintf(\"service healthy\"), nil\n117: }\n118: ",
    "url": "https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/kubernetes--8c9c67c0@8c9c67c000104450cfc5a5f48053a9a84b73cf93/-/blob/pkg/probe/grpc/grpc.go"
  }
}
